narrative:
Batavia Township B (precinct in Clermont County) has 1,812 registered voters, with 54.6% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 34.3% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 11.0%, a pronounced Republican lean of 23.3 percentage points.
